mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = #{name} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM users
is_deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users
is_deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (name, password, real_name, phone, role, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, password = #{password}, real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
